Operation 'add' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Summary is clear and action-oriented, but description is completely missing. Added details about what inputs are accepted (URL, metadata), what is returned (item with ID and timestamp), and side effects (item becomes immediately available). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.description_suggestion: Adds a new item to the user's Pocket list. Accepts a URL and optional metadata including title, tags, and content type. Returns the added item with its assigned ID and timestamp. The item is immediately available in the user's list and can be retrieved with subsequent requests.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented, but description is completely missing. Added details about what inputs are accepted (URL, metadata), what is returned (item with ID and timestamp), and side effects (item becomes immediately available). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'modify' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable, poor_ai_interpretability. Summary lacks specificity about what 'modify' means in context. Description is missing entirely. Enhanced summary to clarify batch operation nature. Added description explaining accepted actions (archive, favorite, delete, tag, update), that it's atomic, and immediate effects. This enables AI agents to understand the scope of modifications possible and when batch operations are appropriate.

data.description_suggestion: Modifies multiple items in the user's Pocket list in a single batch operation. Accepts an array of item modifications specifying actions such as archive, favorite, delete, tag, or update. Returns confirmation of applied changes. All modifications are atomic and immediately reflected in the user's list.
data.reasoning: Summary lacks specificity about what 'modify' means in context. Description is missing entirely. Enhanced summary to clarify batch operation nature. Added description explaining accepted actions (archive, favorite, delete, tag, update), that it's atomic, and immediate effects. This enables AI agents to understand the scope of modifications possible and when batch operations are appropriate.

message: Operation 'getRequestToken' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context, poor_ai_interpretability. Summary is clear but description is missing. Added context about OAuth flow step, required inputs (consumer key, redirect URI), what is returned (request token and auth URL), and how it relates to the next step. data.description_suggestion: Initiates OAuth authentication flow by requesting a temporary request token. Requires consumer key and redirect URI. Returns a request token and authorization URL that the user must visit to grant access. The request token is used in the subsequent authorization step to obtain an access token.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is missing. Added context about OAuth flow step, required inputs (consumer key, redirect URI), what is returned (request token and auth URL), and how it relates to the next step. This clarifies the operation's role in the authentication workflow for AI agents.

data.description_suggestion: Completes OAuth authentication by exchanging a request token for an access token. Requires the request token obtained from getRequestToken and user authorization. Returns an access token and username that enables authenticated API requests. The access token should be stored securely for subsequent API calls.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is missing.
